revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{#if: {{{1<includeonly>|</includeonly>}}}|{{{1}}} }}[[File:.docx icon.svg|17x17px|link=DOC (computing)]]<small>[[DOC (computing)|DOC]]{{#if: {{{2<includeonly>|</includeonly>}}}| ({{{2}}})}}</small><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=DOClink here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=DOClink for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#if: {{{1<includeonly>|</includeonly>}}}|{{{1}}} }}[[File:.docx icon.svg|17x17px|link=DOC (computing)]]<small>[[DOC (computing)|DOC]]{{#if: {{{2<includeonly>|</includeonly>}}}| ({{{2}}})}}</small><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS TO THE /doc SUBPAGE, THANKS -->
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
